templates.questions: Thanks for your question! 💡 We appreciate your interest. Check out our [RESOURCE_LINK] for more info, or let us know if you need clarification!
templates.praise: Thank you so much! 🙏 Comments like yours fuel our work. We're thrilled you found this helpful!

setup_instructions:
1. Get your YouTube channel ID: youtube.com/account (Advanced settings)
2. Replace CHANNEL_ID_HERE with your actual channel ID (format: UCxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx)
3. Save Google OAuth credentials to .cache/credentials.json
4. Run: python ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py
